channel.title: OriginX AI
channel.description: AI Voice Agents & Automation for Enterprise

item.title: AI Will Handle 80% of Your Customer Service by 2029 — Here's What That Actually Means for BPO
item.description: Gartner predicts AI will resolve 80% of customer service by 2029. For BPO companies, this isn't a threat — it's the biggest opportunity in a decade.

item.title: Autonomous AI Agents Crossed a Threshold — Karpathy's AutoResearch Shows What Actually Works
item.description: AI agents went from 33% to 81% on real coding benchmarks in 18 months. But 95% of enterprise pilots still fail. Here's why constraint is the real innovation.

item.title: The 7 Best AI Agent Platforms for Business in 2026 (Tested & Compared)
item.description: Real pricing, G2 ratings, and honest reviews of every major AI agent platform. From enterprise giants to open-source frameworks — with data, not marketing.

item.title: AI Voice Agents vs Call Centers: The Real Cost Breakdown ($0.04 vs $2.38/min)
item.description: Detailed cost comparison of AI voice agents vs human call centers. Real pricing from Retell AI, Vapi, Bland AI, and self-built solutions with ROI timelines.

item.title: The Enterprise Guide to AI Automation in 2026: Cut Costs 40-60% While Scaling Operations
item.description: Complete guide to enterprise AI automation — voice agents, lead automation, CRM integration. Real ROI data, implementation framework, and industry playbooks.
